mainEntity.name: Can I Get Benefits if the Accident Was My Fault?
mainEntity.text: Can I Get Benefits if the Accident Was My Fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: A: Usually, yes! Workers' comp is "no-fault," meaning as long as you weren't intoxicated or breaking safety rules on purpose, you're likely covered. Don't let a simple mistake stop you from getting medical care. If the insurance company tries to use 'fault' to deny your claim, call us at 801-746-0290. We'll help clarify the "no-fault" rules for your specific case.
